title: Radiant Ores
description: Makes ores glow for easier visibility in caves!
body:
![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/GHbkoYvX?label=Downloads)\
Glowing Ores is a simple resource pack that makes ores glow, for easier visibility in caves!\
Never miss an ore again when mining!\
Please note this requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or another connected textures mod that supports emissive textures.
![Radiant Ores](https://i.postimg.cc/ht3wcg89/2024-11-12-18-05-49.png)
[Report Issues](https://github.com/sniffercraft34/Radiant-Ores/issues)\
[View Source](https://github.com/sniffercraft34/Radiant-Ores)\
Enjoy!\
Works with 1.18+!
